payload.answer: Existing memory says Sam (Goldman) has two children, but the new input says Sam (Goldman) has no children. These cannot both be true, so the new claim should not replace the existing fact without additional evidence.

payload.decision: Do not overwrite existing memory; record the new information as conflicting/ambiguous rather than committing it as current.
